title: Proactive Intelligence — Weekly Strategic Digest
content:
**🧠 Proactive Intelligence — Weekly Strategic Digest**

Right now I'm reactive — I answer when asked. But given your role leading AI strategy at the British Red Cross, what if I **proactively tracked the landscape** and delivered a curated intelligence brief every Monday?

**What you'd get each Monday morning:**
- 🔬 **AI Policy & Regulation** — new government guidance, charity sector AI policies, NHS/public sector AI moves
- 🏥 **Humanitarian AI** — how other Red Cross/Red Crescent societies and NGOs are deploying AI
- 🛠️ **Tools & Frameworks** — new releases relevant to your AI Hub (agent frameworks, governance tools, responsible AI toolkits)
- 💡 **One Actionable Insight** — a single recommendation tied to your current strategy work

**How it works:**
- Runs autonomously Sunday night via the overnight worker
- Web searches across 10-15 curated source categories
- Synthesises into a concise digest (under 1000 words)
- Delivers to #daily-briefing Monday 9am alongside the regular briefing
- You can tune the topics anytime: "Add NHS AI updates" or "Drop the tools section"

**Why this matters:**
You're writing the AI strategy right now. Having a weekly radar of what's moving in your space — without having to go looking — means your strategy stays current and you spot opportunities early.

**One-line summary:** A personal AI intelligence analyst that works while you don't.

Shall I build it? ✅ Yes / ❌ No / 🔄 Modify the idea
